prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，社会报考热度高；安徽省202 6年物理类考生约31.3万人（较2025年32.1万略减），竞争基数略有缩小；省控线本科批461分（2025年），近年基本稳定；中央民族大学位于北京，对安徽考生 具有较强地域吸引力；该校在安徽招生占比约2.8%（2025年），属中等偏下水平，非主要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、软科排 名大幅提升（吸引更多高分考生关注）、物理类考生基数略减等因素，预计2026年竞争略有缓和，位次较2025年小幅前移。预测最低位次约15619名，区间15119–16119名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9399 → 11869 → 13733 → 13548 → 15739, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6340 positions in the last 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 15739, a significant backward shift of about 2191 positions compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition; the enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province for Physics Category was 17 in 2021, 42 in 2022, 55 in 2023, 55 in 2024, and 56 in 2025, with gradual expansion; the 2026 plan is 56, unchanged from 2025, with the expansion trend pausing, providing no additional relief to competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 80th (rated 'average'), with moderate short video exposure and no abnormal fluctuations in application attention; Ethnology is A+ (top nationally), Sociology A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, consistent with the university's humanities and social sciences characteristics; among the Physics Category enrollment majors, Law, Economics, etc., have average relevance to its advantageous disciplines, but Computer, Electronic Information, and other engineering majors have strong social demand.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other majors continue to be highly recommended with high social application popularity; the number of Physics Category examinees in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 313,000 (slightly down from 321,000 in 2025), with a slightly reduced competition base; the provincial control line for undergraduate batch is 461 points (2025), stable in recent years; Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Anhui examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui is about 2.8% (2025), at a medium-low level, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant rise in Soft Science ranking (attracting more high-scoring examinees), and the slight decrease in the number of Physics Category examinees, it is expected that competition in 2026 will ease slightly, with the ranking moving forward slightly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 15619, with a range of 15119–16119.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<15119), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>16119), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1228 → 1309 → 2357 → 1812 → 1731, with a notable backward shift in 2023 (2357th place), and a gradual recovery in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1731st place, slightly forward compared to 2024.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Anhui Province was 17 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 40 in 2024, and 43 in 2025, showing continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 42, a decrease of 1 (approximately -2.33%) from 2025, a slight contraction, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 80th (rated as 'average'), with short video exposure at a medium level, and no abnormal fluctuations in application attention; Ethnology A+ (top in the country), Sociology A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, highly related to History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature corresponds to Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology category corresponds to Sociology A-, Ethnology major corresponds to Ethnology A+), with advantageous disciplines strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature are socially popular, while Teacher Education/Education is differentiated and wait-and-see; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Anhui Province is approximately 138,000 (slightly decreased from 141,000 in 2025), with a slightly reduced competition base; the provincial control line for undergraduate batch is 477 points (2025), stable in recent years; Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Anhui examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui is about 2.8% (2025), at a medium-low level, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recovery trend of historical rankings in the last two years, the slight contraction in enrollment in 2026 (slightly intensified competition), the significant improvement in Soft Science ranking (enhancing the university's appeal), and the slight decrease in the number of History Category examinees, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will be roughly flat with a slight backward shift compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1737th place, with a range of 1424–2050.
